metadata.title: Forgotten Domain: World - Creature & Spell Database

arcanica.description: Blue mana - Arcane magic, time manipulation, crystals

verdantia.description: Green mana - Nature, life, growth, beasts

emboria.description: Red mana - Fire, rage, destruction, passion

voidia.description: Black/Purple mana - Shadow, death, void, necromancy

creatures.name: Arcane Guardian
creatures.effect: Basic tank with minor magic shield

creatures.effect: Powerful Burning Rage (damage increases each turn)
